reasoning: The probability of a pilot report originating from South America occurring in a single, specific month (June 2025) and being posted to NUFORC's pilot sub-index in a timely manner is extremely low. Historically, NUFORC is overwhelmingly US-centric, and international pilot reports face both awareness and language barriers. A sample of the pilot sub-index showed only one South American report (Colombia) over several decades, though a recent December 2024 report (Brazil) inspired this question. Even assuming a recent uptick in UAP awareness translating to 1-2 South American pilot reports per year, the baseline probability for any single given month remains roughly 3-8%. Given the tight temporal window and the potential delay in NUFORC's batched update cycle, the odds are placed at the lower bound of 0.05.
